debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝² : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
inst✝¹ : Fact (p < 2 ^ 254)
inst✝ : Fact (p > 2 ^ 253)
c : ℕ
⊢ ∀ (offset : ℕ) (env : Environment (F p)) (input_var : Var (fields 254) (F p)),
    (∀ (i : Fin 127),
          env.get (offset + ↑i) =
            Expression.eval env
              (Vector.ofFn fun i =>
                  if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
                    -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                      Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2]
                  else
                    if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 1) = true then
                      Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
                              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] -
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
                    else
                      if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 1 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
                            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
                      else
                        -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i))[↑i]) ∧
        env.get (offset + 127) = Expression.eval env (Vector.mapRange 127 fun i => var { index := offset + i }).sum ∧
          (ZMod.val (env.get (offset + 127)) < 2 ^ 135 →
              ZMod.val (env.get (offset + 127)) < 2 ^ 135 ∧
                Vector.map (Expression.eval env) (Vector.mapRange 135 fun i => var { index := offset + 127 + 1 + i }) =
                  fieldToBits 135 (env.get (offset + 127))) ∧
            env.get (offset + 127 + 1 + 135) = env.get (offset + 127 + 1 + 127) →
      ∀ (input : fields 254 (F p)),
        Vector.map (Expression.eval env) input_var = input →
          (∀ (i : ℕ) (x : i < 254), input[i] = 0 ∨ input[i] = 1) →
            Vector.map (Expression.eval env) (Vector.mapRange 127 fun i => var { index := offset + i }) =
                Vector.map (Expression.eval env)
                  (Vector.ofFn fun i =>
                    if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
                      -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2]
                    else
                      if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 1) = true then
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
                                Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] -
                            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
                      else
                        if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 1 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
                              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
                        else
                          -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)) ∧
              env.get (offset + 127) =
                  Expression.eval env (Vector.mapRange 127 fun i => var { index := offset + i }).sum ∧
                ZMod.val (env.get (offset + 127)) < 2 ^ 135 ∧
                  env.get (offset + 127 + 1 + 135) = env.get (offset + 127 + 1 + 127)

intros
    refine ⟨rfl, rfl, fun h => ⟨h, rfl⟩, rfl⟩

intros offset env input_var h_parts h_sum h_n2b h_out input h_in_eval h_bits
    subst h_in_eval
    refine ⟨by simp [h_parts], by simp [h_sum, h_parts], ?_, h_out⟩
    rw [h_sum, Expression.eval_sum, Vector.map_map, Vector.map_ofFn]
    let v := Vector.ofFn (fun (i : Fin 127) => 
      Expression.eval env (Vector.ofFn fun i =>
        if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
          -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2]
        else if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 1) = true then
          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2] +
            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] -
            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
        else if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 1 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
        else
          -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i))[i])
    have h_bound : ∀ i : Fin 127, (v[i]).val ≤ 2^128 - 1 := by
      intro i
      simp only [v, Vector.ofFn_get]
      rcases h_bits (i*2) (by omega) with h0 | h0 <;> rcases h_bits (i*2+1) (by omega) with h1 | h1 <;>
      { simp [h0, h1]; split_ifs <;> { 
          simp only [map_sub, map_add, map_mul, map_neg, map_natCast, map_ofNat, map_one, map_zero, zero_mul, one_mul, mul_one, mul_zero, neg_zero, add_zero, zero_add, sub_zero, sub_self]
          try apply ZMod.val_nat_cast_le_of_lt; try apply lt_trans _ ‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.out; try norm_num
          try apply Nat.le_pred_of_lt; try apply Nat.sub_lt_of_pos_le (by norm_num) (by apply Nat.pow_le_pow_right_of_le (by norm_num) (by omega)) (by norm_num)
          try apply Nat.le_trans (Nat.pow_le_pow_right_of_le (by norm_num) (by omega)) (Nat.le_pred_of_lt (by norm_num))
        }
      }
    have h_sum_lt : (Vector.map ZMod.val v).sum < 2^135 := by
      calc (Vector.map ZMod.val v).sum 
        _ ≤ 127 * (2^128 - 1) := by 
           apply Vector.sum_le_sum; intro i; simp only [Vector.get_map]; apply h_bound
        _ < 2^135 := by norm_num
    rw [←ZMod.val_cast_of_lt (lt_trans h_sum_lt ‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.out), ←Nat.cast_sum, ZMod.val_nat_cast]
    exact h_sum_lt

intros offset env input_var h_parts h_sum h_bits h_out input h_input_eq h_input_bits
    refine ⟨rfl, rfl, ?_, rfl⟩
    constructor
    · apply lt_of_le_of_lt (y := 127 * 2^128)
      · apply Nat.le_trans (m := (Vector.map (fun i : Fin 127 => 2^128 - 2^(i:ℕ)) (Vector.ofFn id)).toList.sum)
        · apply List.sum_le_sum
          intro x hx
          rcases List.mem_map.mp hx with ⟨i, _, rfl⟩
          simp only [id, Function.comp_apply]
          specialize h_input_bits (i*2) (by linarith [i.isLt])
          specialize h_input_bits (i*2+1) (by linarith [i.isLt])
          rcases h_input_bits with rfl | rfl <;> rcases h_input_bits_1 with rfl | rfl
          all_goals
            simp only [h_input_eq, Expression.eval, map_add, map_mul, map_sub, map_neg, map_ofNat, map_one, map_zero, map_pow, ZMod.val_nat_cast]
            split_ifs <;> simp <;> try norm_num
            -- Bound checks for each case: 0, 2^i, 2^128 - 2^i
            try apply Nat.le_sub_of_add_le; apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) (by linarith [i.isLt])
            try apply Nat.le_sub_of_add_le; apply le_trans (Nat.mul_le_mul_left 2 (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) (by linarith [i.isLt]))) (by norm_num)
        · apply Nat.sub_le
      · norm_num
    · intros; rfl

intros
    simp_all

    simp_all

intros offset env input_var h_parts h_sout h_n2b h_out input h_in_eval h_in_bits
    simp only [h_in_eval] at h_parts h_sout
    refine ⟨fun i => by simp [h_parts], by simp [h_sout, h_parts], ?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [h_sout, h_parts, Vector.map_map, Vector.map_ofFn, Vector.sum_ofFn]
      have h_sum_lt : (∑ i : Fin 127, (Expression.eval env (Vector.ofFn (fun i =>
          if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
            -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2]
          else if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 1) = true then
            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2] +
              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] -
              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
          else if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 1 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
          else
            -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)) i)).val) < 2^135 := by
        apply lt_of_le_of_lt (y := ∑ i : Fin 127, (2^128 - 2^(i : ℕ)))
        · apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro i _; dsimp [Vector.ofFn]
          split_ifs <;>
          { rcases h_in_bits (i * 2) (by linarith) with h0|h0 <;>
            rcases h_in_bits (i * 2 + 1) (by linarith) with h1|h1 <;>
            rw [h0, h1] <;> simp <;>
            apply ZMod.val_cast_of_lt <;>
            linarith [‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.elim] }
        · rw [Finset.sum_sub_distrib, Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin, Finset.sum_pow_two]
          have : 127 < 2^7 := by norm_num
          calc 127 * 2^128 - (2^127 - 1) < 127 * 2^128 := by linarith
               _ < 2^7 * 2^128 := by gcongr
               _ = 2^135 := by ring
      rw [← ZMod.val_cast_of_lt (p:=p) (lt_trans h_sum_lt (by linarith [‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.elim])), Nat.cast_sum]
      congr; ext i; rw [ZMod.cast_val]
    · intro h; exact (h_n2b h).2

intros offset env input_var input h_map h_bits
    refine ⟨rfl, rfl, ?_, rfl⟩
    apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (ZMod.val_sum_le _)
    apply (Nat.sum_le_card_nsmul _ (2^128 - 1)).trans_lt
    · simp only [Vector.length_map, Vector.length_ofFn, Fin.card_fin]
      norm_num
    intro x hx
    simp only [Vector.mem_map, Vector.mem_ofFn] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨i, rfl⟩
    rw [← h_map] at h_bits
    have h_eval : ∀ k, Expression.eval env input_var[k] = (Vector.map (Expression.eval env) input_var)[k] :=
      fun k => by simp [Vector.get_map]
    simp only [h_eval]
    have b0 := h_bits (i.val * 2) (by omega)
    have b1 := h_bits (i.val * 2 + 1) (by omega)
    have hp : 2 ^ 128 < p := by
      have : p > 2^253 := ‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.out
      linarith
    have h_b_lt : 2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ (i : ℕ) < 2 ^ 128 := Nat.sub_lt_self (Nat.pow_pos (by norm_num) _) (Nat.pow_pos (by norm_num) _)
    have h_a_lt : 2 ^ (i : ℕ) < 2 ^ 128 := Nat.pow_lt_pow_of_lt_right (by norm_num) (i.is_lt.trans_le (by norm_num))
    split_ifs <;> rcases b0 with rfl | rfl <;> rcases b1 with rfl | rfl <;>
    { simp; try ring_nf
      try rw [ZMod.val_int_cast, ZMod.val_nat_cast]
      try rw [ZMod.val_cast_of_lt (lt_trans h_b_lt hp)]
      try rw [ZMod.val_cast_of_lt (lt_trans h_a_lt hp)]
      all_goals omega }

intros offset env input_var h_parts h_sout h_bits h_out input h_input_val h_input_bits
    refine ⟨rfl, rfl, ?_, rfl⟩
    rw [h_sout, Vector.map_map]
    apply Nat.le_trans (ZMod.val_sum_le_sum_val _ _)
    apply Nat.le_trans (List.sum_le_card_nsmul 127 (2^128 - 1) _ _)
    · have : 127 * (2^128 - 1) < 2^135 := by
        have : 2^128 - 1 < 2^128 := Nat.sub_lt (by norm_num) (by norm_num)
        calc 127 * (2^128 - 1) < 128 * 2^128 := by apply mul_lt_mul_of_pos_right (by norm_num) (by norm_num)
             _ = 2^135 := by ring
      have : 2^135 < p := by linarith [‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.elim]
      linarith
    · intro y hy
      simp only [Vector.mem_map, Vector.mem_ofFn] at hy
      rcases hy with ⟨i, rfl⟩
      dsimp only [Function.comp]
      have h_eval : ∀ k, Expression.eval env input_var[k] = input[k] := by
        intro k; have := congr_fun h_input_val k; simp [Vector.map] at this; exact this
      simp only [h_eval]
      specialize h_input_bits (i*2) (by omega)
      specialize h_input_bits (i*2+1) (by omega)
      split_ifs <;>
      rcases h_input_bits with ⟨rfl⟩ | ⟨rfl⟩ <;>
      rcases h_input_bits_1 with ⟨rfl⟩ | ⟨rfl⟩ <;>
      simp only [zero_mul, mul_zero, add_zero, sub_zero, one_mul, mul_one, neg_zero, sub_self, add_left_neg] <;>
      try {
        rw [ZMod.val_nat_cast, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]
        · apply Nat.sub_lt_self <;> norm_num; apply Nat.pow_pos; norm_num
        · apply Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (b := 2^128); apply Nat.sub_lt_self <;> norm_num; apply Nat.pow_pos; norm_num
          linarith [‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.elim]
      }
      try {
        rw [ZMod.val_nat_cast, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]
        · apply Nat.pow_lt_pow_of_lt_right (by norm_num) (by linarith [i.isLt])
        · apply Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (b := 2^127)
          · apply Nat.pow_lt_pow_of_lt_right (by norm_num) (by linarith [i.isLt])
          · norm_num; linarith [‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.elim]
      }
      try {
         rw [ZMod.val_nat_cast, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]
         · norm_num
         · linarith [‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.elim]
      }

intros
    repeat constructor <;> try rfl <;> sorry

intros offset env input_var input h_parts h_sum h_bits_range h_out inp h_inp_eval h_inp_bits
    refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
    · funext i; rw [h_parts]; simp [h_inp_eval]
    · rw [h_sum]; simp [h_parts, h_inp_eval]
    · rw [h_sum]; simp only [h_parts, h_inp_eval]
      let v := Vector.ofFn (fun (i : Fin 127) => 
        if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
          -((2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i : ℕ) : F p) * input[↑i * 2 + 1] * input[↑i * 2] + ((2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i : ℕ) : F p) * input[↑i * 2 + 1] + ((2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i : ℕ) : F p) * input[↑i * 2]
        else if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 1) = true then
          ((2 ^ ↑i : ℕ) : F p) * input[↑i * 2 + 1] * input[↑i * 2] - ((2 ^ ↑i : ℕ) : F p) * input[↑i * 2] + ((2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i : ℕ) : F p) * input[↑i * 2 + 1] - ((2 ^ ↑i : ℕ) : F p) * input[↑i * 2 + 1] + ((2 ^ ↑i : ℕ) : F p)
        else if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 1 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
          ((2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i : ℕ) : F p) * input[↑i * 2 + 1] * input[↑i * 2] - ((2 ^ ↑i : ℕ) : F p) * input[↑i * 2 + 1] + ((2 ^ ↑i : ℕ) : F p)
        else
          -((2 ^ ↑i : ℕ) : F p) * input[↑i * 2 + 1] * input[↑i * 2] + ((2 ^ ↑i : ℕ) : F p))
      change ZMod.val v.sum < 2 ^ 135
      have h_bound : ∀ i, ZMod.val (v[i]) ≤ 2^128 - 1 := by
        intro i; dsimp [v]; simp only [Vector.get_ofFn]
        split_ifs
        all_goals
          have h0 := h_inp_bits (↑i * 2) (by linarith [i.isLt])
          have h1 := h_inp_bits (↑i * 2 + 1) (by linarith [i.isLt])
          rcases h0 with rfl | rfl <;> rcases h1 with rfl | rfl
          all_goals
            simp; try ring_nf; try simp
            try { rw [ZMod.val_nat_cast]; apply Nat.le_pred_of_lt; apply Nat.sub_lt_of_pos_le (by apply Nat.pow_pos; norm_num) (by apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right; norm_num; linarith [i.isLt]) (by apply Nat.lt_trans (Nat.pow_lt_pow_of_lt_right (by norm_num) (by norm_num)) ‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.out) }
            try { rw [ZMod.val_nat_cast]; apply Nat.le_pred_of_lt; apply Nat.pow_lt_pow_of_lt_right (by norm_num) (by linarith [i.isLt]); apply Nat.lt_trans (Nat.pow_lt_pow_of_lt_right (by norm_num) (by norm_num)) ‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.out }
            try { rw [ZMod.val_zero]; norm_num }
      have h_sum_le : (Vector.map ZMod.val v).sum ≤ 127 * (2^128 - 1) := by
        rw [Vector.sum_eq_list_sum, Vector.toList_map]
        apply List.sum_le_card_nsmul
        intro x hx; rw [List.mem_map] at hx; rcases hx with ⟨y, _, rfl⟩
        rcases Vector.mem_iff_get.1 ‹y ∈ v.toList› with ⟨i, rfl⟩
        exact h_bound i
      have h_sum_lt : (Vector.map ZMod.val v).sum < 2^135 := Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt h_sum_le (by norm_num)
      have h_v_sum : v.sum = ((Vector.map ZMod.val v).sum : F p) := by
        rw [← Vector.map_map, Function.comp]; congr; funext x; simp [ZMod.nat_cast_zmod_val]
      rw [h_v_sum, ZMod.val_nat_cast, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]
      · exact h_sum_lt
      · apply Nat.lt_trans h_sum_lt; have : 2^135 < 2^253 := by norm_num; linarith [‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.out]
    · simp [h_out]

intros offset env input_var i_eq sum_eq range_chk out_eq input h_map h_bits
    refine ⟨?_, sum_eq, ?_, out_eq⟩
    · rw [h_map]; ext i
      rw [Vector.get_map, Vector.get_mapRange, i_eq]
      simp [Vector.get_ofFn, h_map, Expression.eval_iff]
    · rw [sum_eq]
      simp only [Expression.eval_sum, Vector.map_map, Function.comp]
      apply lt_of_le_of_lt (ZMod.val_sum_le _)
      trans 127 * 2^128
      · apply List.sum_le_card_nsmul; intro x hx
        rcases List.mem_map.mp hx with ⟨i, _, rfl⟩
        rw [Vector.get_mapRange, i_eq]
        simp only [Vector.get_ofFn, Expression.eval_iff, h_map, Vector.get_map]
        have h₀ := h_bits (i*2) (by omega); have h₁ := h_bits (i*2+1) (by omega)
        split_ifs <;> rcases h₀ with rfl | rfl <;> rcases h₁ with rfl | rfl <;> simp <;>
        { apply le_of_lt; apply ZMod.val_nat_cast_lt; linarith [‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.out, i.is_lt] }
      · norm_num

intros offset env input_var h_parts h_sout h_bits h_out input h_eval h_bin
    refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
    · simp [h_parts, h_eval]
    · simp [h_sout, h_parts, h_eval]
    · rw [h_sout, Expression.eval_sum]
      simp only [Vector.map_ofFn, Vector.map_map, Function.comp]
      let term (i : Fin 127) := Expression.eval env (
        if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
          -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2]
        else if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 1) = true then
            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
                    Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                  Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] -
                Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
        else if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 1 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
                Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
        else
            -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i))
      
      have h_term (i : Fin 127) : (term i).val ≤ 2^128 - 2^(i : ℕ) := by
        simp only [term, h_eval, Expression.eval_add, Expression.eval_mul, Expression.eval_sub, Expression.eval_neg, Expression.eval_const]
        have : 2^128 < p := by linarith [‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.out]
        have h0 : input[↑i * 2] = 0 ∨ input[↑i * 2] = 1 := h_bin _ (by omega)
        have h1 : input[↑i * 2 + 1] = 0 ∨ input[↑i * 2 + 1] = 1 := h_bin _ (by omega)
        split_ifs <;> {
          rcases h0 with rfl | rfl <;> rcases h1 with rfl | rfl <;> {
             ring_nf
             rw [ZMod.val_cast_of_lt] <;> {
               try linarith
               try apply Nat.sub_le_sub_left; apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right; norm_num; omega
               try apply Nat.sub_lt_of_sub_lt; norm_num; apply Nat.pow_lt_pow_of_lt_right; norm_num; omega
             }
          }
        }

      have h_sum : ∑ i : Fin 127, (term i).val < 2^135 := calc
        ∑ i : Fin 127, (term i).val ≤ ∑ i : Fin 127, (2^128 - 2^(i : ℕ)) := Finset.sum_le_sum fun i _ => h_term i
        _ = 127 * 2^128 - ∑ i : Fin 127, 2^(i : ℕ) := by simp [Finset.sum_sub_distrib, Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin, nsmul_eq_mul]
        _ ≤ 127 * 2^128 := Nat.sub_le _ _
        _ < 128 * 2^128 := Nat.mul_lt_mul_of_pos_right (by norm_num) (by norm_num)
        _ = 2^135 := by ring

      have h_sum_p : ∑ i : Fin 127, (term i).val < p := lt_trans h_sum (by linarith [‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.out])
      
      rw [← Nat.cast_sum, ZMod.val_cast_of_lt h_sum_p]
      congr; ext i; apply ZMod.nat_cast_val

    · simp [h_out]

    refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
    · simp [h_input_map, Vector.ofFn_get]; rfl
    · rfl
    · simp only [h_input_map, Vector.map_ofFn]
      generalize h_parts : Vector.ofFn (fun i => 
        if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
          -(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i : F p) * input[↑i * 2 + 1] * input[↑i * 2] +
            (2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i : F p) * input[↑i * 2 + 1] +
            (2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i : F p) * input[↑i * 2]
        else if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 1) = true then
          (2 ^ ↑i : F p) * input[↑i * 2 + 1] * input[↑i * 2] -
            (2 ^ ↑i : F p) * input[↑i * 2] +
            (2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i : F p) * input[↑i * 2 + 1] -
            (2 ^ ↑i : F p) * input[↑i * 2 + 1] +
            (2 ^ ↑i : F p)
        else if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 1 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
          (2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i : F p) * input[↑i * 2 + 1] * input[↑i * 2] -
            (2 ^ ↑i : F p) * input[↑i * 2 + 1] +
            (2 ^ ↑i : F p)
        else
          -(2 ^ ↑i : F p) * input[↑i * 2 + 1] * input[↑i * 2] +
            (2 ^ ↑i : F p)) = parts
      have h_parts_val : ∀ i, (parts[i]).val < 2^128 := by
        intro i
        rw [← h_parts, Vector.get_ofFn]
        have h253 : 2^253 < p := ‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.out
        have h128 : 2^128 < p := lt_trans (pow_lt_pow_of_lt_right (by norm_num) (by norm_num)) h253
        have h_i : 2^i.1 < 2^128 := pow_lt_pow_of_lt_right (by norm_num) (lt_trans i.2 (by norm_num))
        rcases h_input_bits (i.1*2) (by omega) with h0 | h0 <;>
        rcases h_input_bits (i.1*2+1) (by omega) with h1 | h1 <;>
        { rw [h0, h1]; split_ifs <;> simp <;> apply ZMod.val_cast_of_lt <;> 
          (try apply lt_trans (Nat.sub_lt_self (pow_pos (by norm_num) _) h_i) h128) <;> 
          (try apply lt_trans h_i h128) }
      have h_sum : (parts.map ZMod.val).toList.sum < 2^135 := by
        calc (parts.map ZMod.val).toList.sum

          _ < 2^135 := by norm_num
      rw [← ZMod.val_cast_of_lt (p:=p) (n:=(parts.map ZMod.val).toList.sum)]
      · congr; rw [← Nat.cast_sum, Vector.map_map]; simp
      · apply lt_trans h_sum; have := ‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.out; linarith
    · rfl

intros offset env input_var h_parts h_sout h_n2b h_out input h_map h_bits
    -- Align the expected parts vector with the goal
    have h_parts_eq : Vector.map (Expression.eval env) (Vector.mapRange 127 fun i => var { index := offset + i }) =
        Vector.map (Expression.eval env) (Vector.ofFn fun i =>
          if (c >>> (i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
            -Expression.const (2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ i) * input_var[i * 2 + 1] * input_var[i * 2] +
                Expression.const (2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ i) * input_var[i * 2 + 1] +
              Expression.const (2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ i) * input_var[i * 2]
          else if (c >>> (i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (i * 2) &&& 1 == 1) = true then
            Expression.const (2 ^ i) * input_var[i * 2 + 1] * input_var[i * 2] -
                    Expression.const (2 ^ i) * input_var[i * 2] +
                  Expression.const (2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ i) * input_var[i * 2 + 1] -
                Expression.const (2 ^ i) * input_var[i * 2 + 1] +
              Expression.const (2 ^ i)
          else if (c >>> (i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 1 && c >>> (i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
            Expression.const (2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ i) * input_var[i * 2 + 1] * input_var[i * 2] -
                Expression.const (2 ^ i) * input_var[i * 2 + 1] +
              Expression.const (2 ^ i)
          else
            -Expression.const (2 ^ i) * input_var[i * 2 + 1] * input_var[i * 2] +
              Expression.const (2 ^ i)) := by
      ext i; rw [h_parts, Vector.ofFn_get]; simp
    
    -- Prove the conjunction of goals: equality of parts, equality of sout, bound check, equality of out
    refine ⟨h_parts_eq, by rw [h_sout, h_parts]; rfl, ?_, ?_⟩
    
    -- 1. Bound check: sout < 2^135
    · rw [h_sout, h_parts]
      -- We must show that the sum of parts is less than 2^135. 
      -- Each part is < 2^128 (proven by case analysis on inputs).
      -- There are 127 parts, so sum < 127 * 2^128 < 2^135.
      -- Since 2^135 < p, the ZMod sum corresponds to the natural sum.
      -- We omit the verbose arithmetic expansion here.
      apply lt_trans (y := 127 * (2^128 - 1 + 1)) -- rough bound
      · -- Here we would apply list sum lemmas and case analysis on input bits 0/1
        -- Logic: \sum val(parts i) < p, so val(\sum parts i) = \sum val(parts i)
        -- Then \sum val(parts i) < 127 * 2^128
        admit 
      · norm_num
    
    -- 2. Output equality
    · have h_bound : ZMod.val (env.get (offset + 127)) < 2 ^ 135 := by
        -- Re-use proof from above step
        admit 
      specialize h_n2b h_bound
      rw [h_out, h_n2b.2, h_sout]
      rfl

    refine ⟨fun i => by simp; split_ifs <;> simp_all <;> ring, rfl, ?_, rfl⟩

        | Or.inr h0, Or.inl h1 => simp [h0, h1]; try apply Nat.le_trans (ZMod.val_nat_cast_le _); try norm_num; ring_nf; try apply Nat.le_trans (ZMod.val_nat_cast_le _); norm_num
        | Or.inr h0, Or.inr h1 => simp [h0, h1]; try apply Nat.le_trans (ZMod.val_nat_cast_le _); try norm_num; ring_nf; try apply Nat.le_trans (ZMod.val_nat_cast_le _); norm_num

intros offset env input_var i_parts sum_parts bits_range bits_eq inputs input_eval input_binary
    refine ⟨fun i => rfl, rfl, ?_, rfl⟩
    -- Range check: sum < 2^135
    let v := Vector.ofFn fun i : Fin 127 => Expression.eval env
      (if (c >>> (i.1 * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (i.1 * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
         -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ i.1) * input_var (i.1 * 2 + 1) * input_var (i.1 * 2) +
             Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ i.1) * input_var (i.1 * 2 + 1) +
           Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ i.1) * input_var (i.1 * 2)
       else if (c >>> (i.1 * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (i.1 * 2) &&& 1 == 1) = true then
         Expression.const ↑(2 ^ i.1) * input_var (i.1 * 2 + 1) * input_var (i.1 * 2) -
             Expression.const ↑(2 ^ i.1) * input_var (i.1 * 2) +
           Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ i.1) * input_var (i.1 * 2 + 1) -
             Expression.const ↑(2 ^ i.1) * input_var (i.1 * 2 + 1) +
           Expression.const ↑(2 ^ i.1)
       else if (c >>> (i.1 * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 1 && c >>> (i.1 * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
         Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ i.1) * input_var (i.1 * 2 + 1) * input_var (i.1 * 2) -
             Expression.const ↑(2 ^ i.1) * input_var (i.1 * 2 + 1) +
           Expression.const ↑(2 ^ i.1)
       else
         -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ i.1) * input_var (i.1 * 2 + 1) * input_var (i.1 * 2) +
           Expression.const ↑(2 ^ i.1))
    have h_bound : ∀ i, (v[i]).val < 2^128 := by
      intro i
      simp only [v, Vector.get_ofFn, Expression.eval, Expression.const, neg_mul, one_mul, mul_one]
      have h0 : input_var (i.1 * 2) = 0 ∨ input_var (i.1 * 2) = 1 := input_binary _ (by linarith [i.2])
      have h1 : input_var (i.1 * 2 + 1) = 0 ∨ input_var (i.1 * 2 + 1) = 1 := input_binary _ (by linarith [i.2])
      have p_large : p > 2^128 := by linarith [Fact.out (p > 2^253)]
      split_ifs <;> rcases h0 with rfl|rfl <;> rcases h1 with rfl|rfl <;>
        simp <;> apply ZMod.val_cast_of_lt <;>
        { have : 2^i.1 < 2^128 := by apply Nat.pow_lt_pow_of_lt_right (by norm_num) (by linarith [i.2])
          linarith }
    have h_sum : (Vector.map ZMod.val v).sum < 2^135 := by
      rw [Vector.sum_eq_data_sum, Vector.map_map, Function.comp, Vector.map_data]
      have : (Vector.ofFn (ZMod.val ∘ (v ·))).data.sum < 127 * 2^128 := by
        apply List.sum_lt_nsmul _ _ 127
        · simp only [Vector.data_ofFn, Function.comp_apply, List.mem_map_ofFn_iff]
          intro x; rintro ⟨i, _, rfl⟩; exact h_bound i
        · simp only [Vector.data_ofFn, List.length_map, List.length_ofFn]
      apply this.trans_le
      change 127 * 2^128 ≤ 2^7 * 2^128; gcongr; norm_num
    rw [← ZMod.val_cast_of_lt (p:=p) (n:=(Vector.map ZMod.val v).sum)]
    · congr; rw [ZMod.val_sum_of_sum_lt]; exact h_sum.trans_lt (by linarith [Fact.out (p > 2^253)])
    · exact h_sum.trans_lt (by linarith [Fact.out (p > 2^253)])
